problem id: 95205105
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10101001 -> 10010101
  01110101 -> 10001110
  10110010 -> 00010110
  00101000 -> 00000101
  11101101 -> 10011101
  00110101 -> 10000110
  10010101 -> 10010010
  10100001 -> 10010100

query: 10100100
predicted answer: 00010100
